common.error: Ntibishobotse gufungura amakuru. Reba niba seriveri ikora.

landing.heroSubtitle: Egosisteme ya ikoranabuhanga ya VEXA ikubiye hamwe aho kwiga, guhuza imiyoboro, imikoranire n'ibigo, n'amahirwe y'akazi byose bihujwe muri sisitemu imwe.
landing.cycle: Kwiga → Kubaka → Guhuza → Kwereka → Bona Amahirwe
landing.problemDesc: Urugendo rwawe rwa tekinoloji rusabagiye ku mithirimu itandukanye. Nta gukomeza, nta iterambere rusange, kandi imitungo ibakunda ntiboneka.
landing.ctaDesc: Urubuga rwo gukora ekosisteme ufunganye y'iterambere ry'ikoranabuhanga. Iryo senyuka rwa fagitare n'ingamba imwe irigenga ihuza uburezi, umuryango, ibigo, n'akazi.

feed.title: Inkuru z'Ahabanza
feed.subtitle: Sangira ibitekerezo, ibigo, n'amakuru nshya n'ekosisteme.
feed.tipDesc: Huza GitHub yawe kugirango umakuru wawe ugaragare. Imishinga yemejwe ikuza kugaragara inshuro 4.

learning.title: Inzira zo Kwiga
learning.subtitle: Ibyerekeye inzira zigenwa n'inganda. Isomo buri ryoza ryereka kandi ryongerwa ku profili yawe ya proof-of-skill.
learning.certDesc: Bona impamyabumenyi z'imiryango nka Google, AWS, na Meta mu buryo butaziguye binyuze mu guhuza kwacu kwa Company Hub.

network.title: Itumanaho rya Tekinoloji
network.subtitle: Bona inzobere mu bumenyi bwemejwe, si imitwe biyitangira.

companies.title: Huza n'Abayobozi b'Ikoranabuhanga ku Isi Yose
companies.subtitle: Urupapuro rw'ibigo byemejwe rwo gushakisha abakozi, gahunda z'amahugurwa, n'impamyabumenyi zizwi mu nganda.

opportunities.title: Gushakashaka Amahirwe
opportunities.subtitle: Guhurira guhinduwe hashingiwe ku bikorwa byawe by'icyemezo cy'ubumenyi.
